title: Saylac Heat Wave
lead: Saylac is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.26. The city's score is 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heat wave in Saylac has resulted in a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.9 GG, significantly higher than usual. 
 The relative humidity is at 64%, and the wind speed is 6.5 km/h, contributing to the oppressive heat. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the severity of the heat wave, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
